title: Pizza Day Distressed Green Golden Script
source_attribution: Generic Pizza Day menu (AI-aided design study)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Golden cursive script + golden small caps labels + ornament dividers
composition_summary: Scattered plates 7 cells · ornament corner frames + center golden script
why_good: Distressed verde-tejo bg dá rustic-premium feel — mood diferente mas paleta on-brand
Golden script 'Celatrea' display = mesma família tipográfica que #032/#033
Ornament dividers (acanto-style swirls) entre sections = elegant alternativa às lines simples
7 dishes curados em scattered layout = balança variety com restraint
Border verde fino + cantos ornament = frame editorial subtilíssimo
caveats: Text garbled (AI artefact). Border ornaments podem ser too rustic — Só Rio usaria simples hairlines + wave SVG. Mood vintage interessante para campanha sazonal
